@documentation.@comment: Universal base for every domain document in the graph. Carries audit timestamps, provenance, context tagging, and external identity. Registry meta-classes (SchemaModule, SchemaMigration) are deliberately outside this grammar.
Role marker: things other things can be derived from (notes, audio, routines, entities that beget).
Role marker: things other things can be tagged/classified with (locations, projects, areas).
Role marker: things reminders and triggers can attach to.
Role marker: things with a canonical temporal instant. Extensions set anchor_at alongside their domain vocabulary (due_date, start_datetime) to declare their canonical instant.
How this document came to exist. AI acts, never invisibly: source, agent, timestamp, method, and confidence travel together.
Link to the same entity in an external system.
Registry record for an installed schema module, keyed by name. Tracks origin and version for the composer.
Registry record for an applied schema migration, keyed by module and filename. Tracks which migrations have been applied to a database.
